summary: Full portfolio build: 2 casefiles + 8-work product wargame product + 7 interview drills is a preserved project packet for unclassified, employer-ready starter kit for wargaming / red-team / scenario-analysis roles across public sector (DoD/IC/USAJOBS GS), FFRDCs (MITRE, CNA, IDA, RAND), contractors (BAH, CACI, Leidos, SAIC, Amentum, SPA), and private-sector crisis/cyber/resilience practices.
final_use_case: It preserves adversarial review machinery: assumptions, vulnerabilities, rival interpretations, replay evidence, and acceptance gates can be inspected before a claim advances.

Plan: Strengthen source governance, evidence workbench, capstone, and Nexus method pages. Status: source library identified as candidate.

instruments.instrument_name: Full portfolio build: 2 casefiles + 8-work product wargame product + 7 interview drills Integration Path
instruments.input: frontend, backend, storage, retrieval, auth, export, and portfolio linkage
instruments.operation: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. 1. Start with 05_Tools_and_Checklists/Handoff_Checklist.xlsx 2. Customize FFRDC/contractor resume first (most flexible) 3. Then federal/IC resume (adds KSAs) 4. Choose one portfolio case file to complete first (A or B) 5. Export final resume and writing samples to PDF (keep originals as DOCX) 6. Use Interview_Work_Sample_Drills.md to prep for hiring-loop exercises Classification/sensitivity guardrails: keep everything.
